title: lotus pedunculatus
intro: Lotus pedunculatus, also known as Lotus corniculatus, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Lotus pedunculatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antiseptic, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Lotus pedunculatus can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
